author: Malte Henriksson
description: Smart heading commands that respect document hierarchy and indentation. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Malte Henriksson
manifest.description: Smart heading commands that respect document hierarchy and indentation.
manifest.name: Heading Handler

name: Heading Handler

releases.author: goopii
releases.description: Refresh release assets from the passing community review source state.

releases.author: goopii
releases.description:
Address community review warnings.

- Replace builtin-modules with Node's built-in module list.
- Remove unsafe Object.create-based root line construction.
- Includes the license correction from 1.0.3 and heading behavior fixes from 1.0.2.

releases.author: goopii
releases.description:
Align license metadata and release manifest for the community listing.

- Replace inherited 0BSD sample license text with the intended MIT license under Malte Henriksson.
- Bump manifest and version map to 1.0.3.
- Includes the 1.0.2 heading demotion fixes, unordered bullet support, and regression tests.

releases.author: goopii
releases.description:
Prepare Heading Handler for Obsidian community plugin submission.

- Fix multi-line smart demote state handling for nested headings.
- Support heading operations in all unordered bullet markers (-, *, +).
- Keep numbered lists and task checklists unchanged because Obsidian does not apply heading styling there.
- Add focused regression tests for heading demotion behavior.

releases.author: goopii
releases.description:
Updated getMinimumHeading to handle cases where the indent matches the parent's stagedUpdate indent, ensuring correct minimum heading calculation. Also refactored demoteHeading logic for clarity and correctness.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/goopii/heading-handler/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1
